overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a western-themed video game showing a cowboy character walking through a muddy rural town at night. The character approaches and circles a wooden train station building with warm lantern light glowing against a dramatic moonlit sky with scattered clouds and mountain silhouettes in the background.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a muddy road toward a distant lit building with mountains silhouetted against the night sky

entered.detail: large two-story wooden train station building with illuminated windows and a central tower
snow-capped mountain silhouettes against the night sky
tall wooden utility pole with crossbars and wires
leafless deciduous tree with twisted branches

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide muddy road under a partly cloudy night sky, approaching the warm lights of Valentine Station in the distance. Mountains loom in the background while a telegraph pole and bare tree mark the roadside.

events.description: character turns slightly right to circle around the station building

agents.ego_description: walking past the right side of the station building, moving from the front facade toward the rear

entered.detail: wooden pole with a glowing lantern illuminating the muddy ground

segments.scene_description: The character passes the Valentine Station building on its right side, the warm glow of windows contrasting with the cool moonlight. A street lamp appears on the left as the character circles toward the rear of the station.

scene_state.functional_zone: train station platform with wooden decking

events.description: character steps from muddy ground onto wooden station platform

agents.ego_description: walking along the station platform, approaching the entrance and passing tied horses

notable_agents.action: horse standing tethered near the station entrance, occasionally shifting weight

entered.detail: elevated wooden plank walkway with railings leading to the station entrance
wooden sign reading VALENTINE STATION above the main entrance
tall wooden water tower with metal tank visible behind the station

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto the wooden platform of Valentine Station, passing a tethered horse on the right. The station sign becomes visible overhead as the character walks along the covered platform area, with the building now on the left side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, muddy road toward the intimate, lantern-lit confines of a rural train station under a moonlit sky. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path flanked by a telegraph pole and a bare tree, with distant mountains looming beneath scattered clouds. As the character advances, the scene shifts toward the side of the Valentine Station building, where the warm glow of the windows contrasts with the cool moonlight and a street lamp appears on the left. The camera then follows the character as they circle toward the rear of the structure before stepping onto the wooden platform. Finally, the perspective moves past a tethered horse and under the station sign, transitioning from the open road to the covered platform area with the building now positioned on the left.
